Home › Indian River County › Organic Restaurants

Organic Restaurants in Indian River County

Most of the restaurants with organic options in Indian River County grade well: 2 of 3 hold an A, led by BONEFISH GRILL at 96/100. Every listing below carries its latest Florida health grade.

3 organic restaurants

  • A 96 B
    BONEFISH GRILL American ★ 4.2 (1567) Vero Beach · Indian River County GFDF +6 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 92 A
    AY JALISCO III Mexican ★ 4.4 (2253) Sebastian · Indian River County DFKeto +2 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 89 I
    IHOP #36-191 American ★ 4.2 (2435) Vero Beach · Indian River County OrganicHealthy Inspected May 2026
